title: lithocardium longifolium
intro: Lithocardium longifolium, also known as lithospermum longifolium, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as high blood pressure, hypertension, and urinary tract issues. Lithocardium longifolium is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used to promote cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and support kidney function.
